# link11waap_security_policies (Data Source)

Lists all security policies in a configuration.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Example: Security Policies Data Source

data "link11waap_config" "main" {}

data "link11waap_security_policies" "all" {
  config_id = data.link11waap_config.main.id
}

output "security_policies" {
  value = data.link11waap_security_policies.all.security_policies
}

output "security_policy_names" {
  value = [for sp in data.link11waap_security_policies.all.security_policies : sp.name]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `config_id` (String) Configuration ID.

### Read-Only

- `security_policies` (Attributes List) List of security policies. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--security_policies))

<a id="nestedatt--security_policies"></a>
### Nested Schema for `security_policies`

Read-Only:

- `description` (String)
- `id` (String)
- `name` (String)
- `tags` (List of String)
